text:
Beneficiary included in the 15 percent sample for the year 
Null/missing = Beneficiary not included in any sample group for the year 

COMMENT: To use the random 5 percent sample, users must combine the 1 and 4 percent samples (i.e., 
specify that SAMPLE_GROUP can equal “01” or “04”). To use the 20 percent sample, users 
must combine the 1, 4, and 15 percent samples (i.e., specify that SAMPLE_GROUP can equal 
“01”, “04”, or “15”). 

Beneficiaries are assigned to sample groups each year based on
